title: Tomskilljr
compiled_truth: Tomskilljr is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (1999-02-14 to 2001-08-13), Tomskilljr sent 14 and received 50 emails, totalling 64 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jskilli](people/jskilli) (12), [Markskilling](people/markskilling-hotmail) (11), [Tskilling](people/tskilling-tribune) (10), [Ermakfdy](people/ermakfdy-aol) (7), [Ermak](people/ermak-gte) (2).
